summary: P1.1 Granular Permission Yönetim UI - Full Testing Complete. All backend endpoints tested and frontend UI verified.

issues: Minor: React hydration warnings in console for span/option, span/select, tr/span, span/tbody nesting - cosmetic only, does not affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: Permission system is well-implemented with proper security guards (self-edit forbidden, super_admin revoke forbidden, unauthorized 403)
seed_data_creation: Used existing seed users for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: P1.1 Granular Permission UI tested and verified. All acceptance criteria met: 5+ sample grant/revoke operations PASS, shadow diff = 0, unauthorized access returns 403, reason validation (min 10 chars) works, self-edit and super_admin revoke protections verified.

frontend_ui_tests.grant_form_validation: PASS - Reason min 10 chars enforced with error message
frontend_ui_tests.country_scope_multiselect: PASS - Global scope checkbox and country options present
frontend_ui_tests.unauthorized_user_redirect: PASS - User redirected to /account when trying to access /admin/permissions
frontend_ui_tests.navigation_in_sidebar: PASS - Permission Yönetimi menu item visible for super_admin
